summary: High‑quality audience (FO) recording of one of the spring tour’s best shows.
review: Reviewers praise this front‑of‑house capture as superior to the well‑known Fitzy/Keo/Nak/Senn mixes, noting its clear and pleasant sound. The concert itself is described as a standout performance from the spring ’91 tour, making it a worthwhile listen despite the lack of specific song commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed 4‑star review; both performance and recording are described positively, leading to an overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear front‑of‑house mix that outshines the popular Fitzy/Keo/Nak/Senn audience mixes; pleasant balance and detail.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Mentioned as one of the spring tour’s best shows, implying strong overall flow and energy.
